member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.IRasterLocationBuilder
member.summary: Interface abstracts how to obtain Raster location. This varies based on the Device TM used.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.IRasterLocationBuilder.GetLocation
member.summary: Method gets Raster location.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.IWaferLocation
member.summary: Interface to handle the logic for creating raster header for Device Test Methods. As location differs for Wafer and SingleDie test types, this interface provides the extensions to implement the corresponding logic for each test flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.IWaferLocation.GetXCoordinate
member.summary: Gets the DUT X coordinate.
member.returns: DUT X coordinate on the wafer.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.IWaferLocation.GetYCoordinate
member.summary: Gets the DUT y coordinate.
member.returns: DUT y coordinate on the wafer.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.RasterHeader
member.summary: Class to handle the logic for creating raster header for DeviceTMs.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.RasterHeader.#ctor(System.String,Prime.TestMethods.IRasterLocationBuilder)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Format used to display current datetime.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.RasterHeader.CreateHeader(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates Raster header.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.RasterHeader.GetHeader
member.summary: Gets current Raster header in a string format.
member.returns: String containing all of the raster header information.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.IDeviceEndExtensions
member.summary: Class to define extendable methods.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.IDeviceEndExtensions.ModifyLevel3Footer(Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.DeviceEndDatalog.Level3FooterFormat)
member.summary: Called at the end of execute to provide the user a way to modify the level 3 footer before logging to ituff. Default implementation returns default level 3 footer.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.IDeviceEndExtensions.ModifyLevel2Footer(Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.DeviceEndDatalog.Level2FooterFormat)
member.summary: Called at the end of execute to provide the user a way to modify the level 2 footer before logging to ituff. Default implementation returns default level 2 footer.

Formatting Processes.
// The processes do not exist in Unit Test; they will soon be obtained from a TOS API. Pval does have coverage.

members.member: Gets or sets if the test instance must process the OLB tokens or not. >

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.PrimeDeviceEndDatalogTestMethod.TbinOverrideKey

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.StorageWrapper.TryGetIntValue(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Tries to get the value from shared storage service. If key does not exist, will return default value.
member.param: Key to look for in the shared storage service.
Default value to return in case key does not exist.
member.returns: Value obtain from the shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.IDeviceStartPackageDatalogExtensions.ModifyLevel3Header(Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.DeviceStartCommon.Level3HeaderFormat)
member.summary: Called at the end of execute to provide the user a way to modify the level 3 header before logging to ituff. Default implementation returns default level 3 header for package mode.

member.summary: Called at the end of execute to provide the user a way to modify the level 2 header before logging to ituff. Default implementation returns default level 2 header for package mode.

member.summary: Class to handle the logic for creating a level 2 header for package mode.

member.summary: Contains the date format to be used be the raster header to log the DeviceStart time value.

members.member:
************ Start Of PH Parameters ************
Gets or sets the type of visual Id check. Default value is "IGNORE_CAMERA". >

member.summary: Checks that VisualIdCheck parameter has a valid value.

member.summary: Initialize objects of level 2 and level 3.

member.summary: Overrides reset policies from the shared storage and set its value to NEVER_RESET.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.StartWaferDatalog.Level3.Level3HeaderFormat
member.summary: Gets the level2 Ituff format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.StartWaferDatalog.Level3.CreateHeader
member.summary: Method to create level 3 header.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.StartWaferDatalog.RasterLocation
member.summary: Formats wafer location as needed for raster header.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.StartWaferDatalog.WaferLocation
member.summary: Extracts wafer Location from user vars to be used by the raster header.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.PrimeDeviceStartWaferDatalogTestMethod
member.summary: TestMethod in charge of creating and logging the header and footer information for Wafer test floe type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.PrimeDeviceStartWaferDatalogTestMethod.DateFormat
member.summary: Contains the date format to be used be the raster header to log the DeviceStart time value.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.PrimeDeviceStartWaferDatalogTestMethod.UserVarCollectionName
member.summary: Contains the generic user var collection name.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.PrimeDeviceStartWaferDatalogTestMethod.TrueValue
member.summary: Contains string value that matches with TRUE.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.PrimeDeviceStartWaferDatalogTestMethod.InitializeLevels
member.summary: Initialize objects of level 2 and level 3.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.DeviceTelemetryConstants
member.summary: Telemetry constants.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.DeviceTelemetryConstants.UnitId
member.summary: UnitId constant.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.DeviceTelemetryConstants.TestOrderNumber
member.summary: TestOrderNumber constant.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.DeviceTelemetryConstants.DeviceSessionId
member.summary: DeviceSessionId constant.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.StringBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extend the string builder functionality for appending level's headers and footers information.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DeviceSession.StringBuilderExtensions.Append(System.Text.StringBuilder,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Appends the level, token and value to the StringBuilder using the following format : {level}_{token}_{value}.
member.param: The ituff level in which to log the token information.
Indicates the meaning of the information to be logged to the output file.
Value corresponding to the ituff token.
Flag indicating if the token can be printed to the output file even with an empty value. Flag is set to FALSE by default.
member.returns: The StringBuilder with the appended data.
member.remarks: String line is append to the string builder only when value is not empty.
